description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel, commonly used for shipping and deliveries in urban environments. The box is made of brown corrugated cardboard and features a single strip of sealing tape running along the top. On one side, there are two upward-pointing black arrows indicating the correct orientation for handling, while the opposite side displays a barcode for tracking and a black fish symbol, possibly denoting the contents or a brand logo. The surface of the box is matte and slightly textured, typical of standard shipping cartons. The box appears to be fully sealed and intact, with no visible openings or damage.
description: A brown cardboard shipping box with tape, handling arrows, a barcode, and a fish symbol printed on its sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the brown box with two black upward arrows and a central strip of sealing tape.
description_view_1: This side displays a barcode and a black fish symbol, with the tape strip visible on top.
description_view_2: The back view shows a plain brown surface with the edge of the fish symbol and the tape strip.
description_view_3: This side is plain brown with the fish symbol and tape strip visible on the top surface.
